title: Deprecated 'catch' syntax in test setup
evidence: test/book_store_tests.erl:11 — `catch file:delete(File)` triggers OTP 29 deprecation warning; should use `try ... catch ... end`
suggestion: Replace bare `catch` with `try file:delete(File) catch _:_ -> ok end`

title: Deprecated 'catch' syntax in test cleanup
evidence: test/book_store_tests.erl:17 — same deprecated `catch` pattern in cleanup/1
suggestion: Replace bare `catch` with `try file:delete(File) catch _:_ -> ok end`
